name: Slave Princess Finne ~ IF Story 1
developer: Circle Fairy Flower, サークル☆フェアリーフラワー
short_description: It is the story of Finne's - what if? The human route and the elven route are included
detailed_description:
♥♥ ADD IN WISHLIST!! ♥♥


About the Game

There is no gameplay in this game, and you can see additional endings that do not exist in the main story of Slave Princess Finne here.

This is one of the "what if" episodes of Slave Princess Finne!

It is the story of Finne's - what if?

The human route and the elven route are included

Human route story.

If "Kimota", a resident of Grant City, finds a mysterious crystal, what will happen to Finne?

Elf Route Story.

Finne is on a journey to win the battle of the princess.

After being sold to a slave market, she is bought by a rich man named "Mori".

Game Features

Short RPG story presentation

Additional story content

This mini-game is recommended to be played after playing the main story of "Slave Princess Finne".

Slave Princess Finne ~ IF Story Trilogy！
